title: Support Product Q&A and Auxiliary Decision-Making: Apple Store App to Introduce AI Virtual Shopping Assistant
excerpt: According to MacRumors, Apple Inc. has recently updated the privacy policy of the Apple Store app, hinting at the upcoming launch of a "virtual shopping assista
content_html:
According to MacRumors, Apple Inc. has recently updated the privacy policy of the Apple Store app, hinting at the upcoming launch of a "virtual shopping assistant" feature. This feature aims to answer product questions and assist users in decision-making through a generative AI conversation interface. Previously, Apple introduced a similar virtual assistant in the Apple Support app. This time, the AI interaction capability is extended to retail terminals, marking a key strategic move for Apple to enhance AI-driven e-commerce retail experiences.

In terms of functional logic and data mechanisms, the assistant will collect account information, device identifiers, carrier information, chat history, and location data to provide highly personalized recommendations. In terms of privacy protection and compliance, Apple clearly states that before sharing chat data with third-party partners, it will undergo thorough anonymization, removing all personal identifiers. Partners can only use the data to generate conversation responses. Additionally, chat records will be stored for users to review, business analysis, and experience optimization with user authorization.

At present, the virtual shopping assistant has not been officially launched but is expected to be in internal or small-scale testing. As terminal devices and large models become more deeply integrated, Apple is seamlessly embedding AI chat assistants into e-commerce scenarios. This not only helps improve conversion efficiency and user experience but also accelerates the adoption of generative AI in the consumer retail ecosystem.

sentences.en: As terminal devices and large models become more deeply integrated, Apple is seamlessly embedding AI chat assistants into e-commerce scenarios.
sentences.zh: 随着终端设备与大型机型的融合更加深入，苹果正在将AI聊天助手无缝嵌入到电商场景中。

sentences.en: This not only helps improve conversion efficiency and user experience but also accelerates the adoption of generative AI in the consumer retail ecosystem.
sentences.zh: 这不仅有助于提高转化效率和用户体验，还能加速生成式人工智能在消费零售生态系统中的采用。

content_html_zh:
据 MacRumors 报道，苹果公司近日更新了 Apple Store 应用的隐私政策，暗示即将推出“虚拟购物助手”功能。 该功能旨在通过生成式AI对话界面回答产品问题并协助用户决策。 此前，苹果在 Apple 支持应用程序中引入了类似的虚拟助手。 此次，AI交互能力延伸至零售终端，是苹果提升AI驱动的电商零售体验的关键战略举措。

在功能逻辑和数据机制上，助手将收集账户信息、设备标识符、运营商信息、聊天记录和位置数据，以提供高度个性化的推荐。 在隐私保护和合规方面，苹果明确表示，在与第三方合作伙伴共享聊天数据之前，将进行彻底的匿名化处理，删除所有个人标识符。 合作伙伴只能使用这些数据来生成对话响应。 此外，聊天记录将被保存，供用户在授权的情况下查看、业务分析、体验优化。

目前，虚拟导购尚未正式上线，预计会进行内部或小规模测试。 随着终端设备与大型机型的融合更加深入，苹果正在将AI聊天助手无缝嵌入到电商场景中。 这不仅有助于提高转化效率和用户体验，还能加速生成式人工智能在消费零售生态系统中的采用。
